projectDescription: A synchronized 24/7 online radio streaming platform built with JavaScript, featuring scheduled programming and real-time audio playback.
keyFeatures: Synchronized audio streaming - all listeners hear the same track at the same time
24/7 automated programming with time-based show scheduling
Web-based audio player with play/pause controls and share functionality
Python-based playlist generation tool for managing music collections
Responsive design with custom typography and visual branding
Support for external streaming platforms via PHP stream endpoint
publicApiSurface: playTransmisionExacta() - Synchronize playback to global timeline
calcularPosicionExacta() - Calculate exact track position for sync
updateDisplayInfo() - Update UI with current show information
formatTimeForDisplay() - Format time strings for display
playlist.json - Playlist data structure with tracks array
scheduleData - Schedule configuration with time slots and programs
